items.title: ETFs weekly recap – How did Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana and XRP do this week?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The performance of Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and XRP in the ETF landscape can influence investor sentiment and liquidity dynamics within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Global interest rates, Robinhood, Galaxy earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
items.whyYouShouldCare: Global interest rates and corporate earnings reports can impact market conditions, affecting Solana's positioning and the overall crypto investment climate.

items.title: 88 people charged over 12 crypto wrench attacks in France
items.whyYouShouldCare: The rise in crypto-related crime, such as wrench attacks, poses risks to the security and trust in the Solana network and broader crypto space.
